dataset: products.csv (100 real retail items from Shopify Partners, GitHub Gist, and real electronics data)

pi_items.source: Grep search of products.csv for 'USB-C Charging Cable' and '3ft' - no matches found. Only 'Apple Lightning Cable 1m' (ELE-0091) and 'Anker USB-C Hub 7-in-1' (ELE-0100) contain USB-C in their names
Grep search of products.csv for 'USB-C30' and SKU pattern analysis. Products are numbered CLO-0001 through ELE-0100. USB-C30 does not follow the product numbering scheme and does not exist in the CSV
Web search result from SoftwareAdvice.com and NCH Software official documentation confirms Copper POS supports Cash, Credit Card, and Check payment methods

Path confirmed used in multiple other tasks in the environment (configure_transaction_series, create_service_items, import_customers_csv all reference this exact path with \Shared subdirectory for database files like copper.db and Items.db)

privileged_info_summary: Cash is a valid payment method supported by Copper Point of Sale. The database is stored at C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper\Shared, which is consistent across the environment. However, the target item 'USB-C Charging Cable 3ft' with code 'USB-C30' does not exist in the products.csv dataset. The products.csv file contains 100 real retail items sourced from Shopify Partners, GitHub Gist, and real electronics product data, but does not include this specific cable item. The closest USB-C related items in inventory are 'Apple Lightning Cable 1m' (ELE-0091) and 'Anker USB-C Hub 7-in-1' (ELE-0100).
